ab: aizaanik tasa aluszangan tupaun tu Dahu, mazima lalaktan.
ch: 我有一個同學叫Dahu，他常常忘記帶東西。
en: I have a classmate named Dahu, he often forgets to bring things.

ab: mais isnavaan hai, simul sian aluszangan mas ispapatas, ishahaishais siin ahil.
ch: 上課的時候，他跟同學借鉛筆、橡皮擦或是筆記本。
en: During class, he borrowed pencils, erasers or notebooks from his classmates.

ab: mus’an, mupus’an, muciun, mapasimulang amin aluszangan mas saicia.
ch: 一次、兩次、三次，大家會借東西給他。
en: Once, twice, three times, everyone would lend him something.

ab: haitu, dangian a saia mas makuang tu kainaaman, mais sinimul hai nitu masuhis.
ch: 但是他有個壞習慣，經常借了東西卻不還。
en: But he has a bad habit of often borrowing things but not returning them.

ab: kinuzin, nii’in amin asa mapasimul mas saicia.
ch: 最後大家都不想借他東西了。
en: In the end, no one wanted to borrow anything from him.

ch: 有一天，我們大家一起去郊遊。
en: One day, we all went on an outing together.

ab: isianang daan, cin’asa a Dahua muunata, haitu nitu minadas mas ahilkuskus.
ch: 路途中，Dahu想上廁所，但他忘記帶衛生紙。
en: On the way, Dahu wanted to go to the bathroom, but he forgot to bring toilet paper.

ab: nasimul a saia sian aluszangan mas ahilkuskus, haitu tupa amin tu: nii’ik amin minadas.
ch: 他跟同學借衛生紙，可是大家都回他說，我也沒有帶耶。
en: He borrowed toilet paper from his classmates, but everyone told him that I didn’t bring them either.

ab: kaivakaiva a Dahua at tangis, malsupnuh tupa tu, “mavia kamu tu nitu mapasimulku mas ahilkuskus i!”
ch: Dahu急的哭了出來。他生氣的說，為什麼大家都不借我衛生紙!
en: Dahu burst into tears. He said angrily, why don’t everyone lend me toilet paper!

ab: tahuan a saia mas aluszangan tu: atanau i niias kanak’anak maadas, musasu mais pasimulanas hai, nitu namasuhis.”
ch: 同學告訴他，因為你都不自己帶，而且借給你的東西，你都不會還!
en: The classmate told him, because you didn’t bring it yourself, and you wouldn’t return the things lent to you!

ab: masa kutunin tu isnavaan, macinsanus a Dahua kusian pasnanavaan, sizaun mas dahucia a sinsisimul masuhis sian aluszangan.
ch: 隔天上學，Dahu很早就到學校了，Dahu把跟同學借的東西都還給同學們。
en: The next day at school, Dahu arrived at school early and returned everything he had borrowed from his classmates.

ab: masi’aupa a Dahu sian aluszangan pisssuhdung, at tupa tu: nakanak’anakik maisinin maadas mas iskukusia, uninang mas aluszangan i maipasisimulku mas haimangsut.
ch: Dahu向同學們道歉，並說他以後一定會自己帶東西，也謝謝同學們之前願意借他東西。
en: Dahu apologized to the students and said that he would definitely bring his own things in the future, and thanked the classmates for their willingness to lend him things before.
